subject: A desolate landscape of jagged corrupted terrain formations, consumed and transformed by Eldrazi presence — twisted spire-like masses of pale fibrous material rise from a dusty canyon floor while small humanoid figures stand dwarfed at the periphery
description: A wide establishing shot of a ravaged canyon or gorge interior. The dominant visual elements are tall, pale, fibrous or coral-like spire formations that rise from the ground — their texture is organic and asymmetric, suggesting Eldrazi corruption of formerly solid stone. The atmosphere is hazy and washed out, lit with a diffuse, flat grey light. Small humanoid silhouettes are visible at the lower right edge, emphasizing the massive scale of the corrupted landscape. The ground is broken and strewn with jagged debris. No active figure is the focus — the landscape itself is the subject.
foreground: Broken stone ground, jagged dark debris, pale fibrous spire bases
background: Tall pale corrupted spire formations rising into a hazy washed-out sky
